name: Security Audit
description: Systematically identify security vulnerabilities, assess attack surface, and produce actionable remediation guidance across code, dependencies, and infrastructure.
conditions: Requires access to the full codebase or diff; output must include severity classification and reproduction steps.

evidence.notes: intelligentcode-ai/skills security-engineer — vulnerability assessment and security architecture with zero-trust principles and compliance management.
microsoft/PromptKit (42 stars) — composable prompt components for security audits, code review, and bug investigation with any LLM.
